## Changes in feature/add-database

This push contains changes ready for review.

**Base commit:** `ce19767`
**Head commit:** `1bf5445`

## Component Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph push_flow["Push Recovery Flow"]
        direction TB
        startup_hooks["Daemon hook re-install on startup"] -- ensures --> post_receive["Post-receive hook"]
        post_receive -- uses --> marker_helpers["Marker ref helpers in git::refs"]
        marker_helpers -- creates --> markers["Push marker refs refs/airlock/pushed/*"]
        markers -- filters input for --> detect_missed["detect_missed_pushes_for_repo"]
        detect_missed -- delegates to --> coalesced["process_coalesced_push"]
        coalesced -- creates --> run_create["Pipeline run creation"]
    end
```
